sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102077" key="swrobo/lion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σωρο-βόλιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n102077.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">place for depositing heaps</tr_> (of corn or of refuse), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">LW</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">424</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">427</biblScope> </bibl> (<placeName TEIform="placeName">Mylasa</placeName>).</sense> </entryFree>
